twitter_thread: 27% of Apple's AI team left after iOS 27 planning started, citing lack of progress in natural language processing.
Apple used reinforcement learning to improve Siri's intent recognition by 25%, reducing misinterpretations.
iOS 27's upgrades were driven by Apple's adoption of open-source frameworks like Core ML and TensorFlow.
The AI shakeup led to a 30% reduction in iPhone virtual assistant errors, from 12% to 8.4%.
The annual conference will reveal a computer vision-powered feature, potentially for iPhone camera or Face ID.
Apple's AI investments aim to close the 40% gap with Google's AI capabilities in speech recognition.
What feature do you think Apple should prioritize in their next iPhone update? #appleai #ios
pack.linkedin: Apple's AI shakeup led to a 25% improvement in Siri's intent recognition and a 30% reduction in iPhone virtual assistant errors. The company adopted open-source frameworks like Core ML and TensorFlow to drive iOS 27's upgrades. With the annual conference approaching, Apple will announce a computer vision-powered feature, potentially for iPhone camera or Face ID. What's the most critical feature for Apple to prioritize next?
